description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden desk with a dark brown finish and visible red stains or discolorations on its surface. The desk is topped with several office items, including a black computer monitor with blue headphones resting on it, a black cylindrical cup, and a black office phone with a keypad and receiver. The desk has a solid, blocky base with no visible drawers or compartments, giving it a sturdy and imposing appearance. The wood grain is visible, and the surface shows signs of wear, particularly where the red stains are present. The overall design is utilitarian, suitable for a professional or administrative setting.
description: A large, dark brown wooden desk with red stains, topped with a monitor, blue headphones, a cup, and a phone. The desk is solid and shows signs of wear.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full desktop with all items visible: monitor with blue headphones, cup, and phone, as well as prominent red stains on the left side.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the monitor and blue headphones, with the red stains more visible along the top surface and less detail of the other items.
description_view_2: The back view displays the monitor from behind, the cup, and the phone, with red stains on the right side of the desk.
description_view_3: The opposite side view focuses on the phone and cup, with the red stains clearly visible on the right edge of the desk.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the monitor, phone, and cup arranged for easy access, indicating this is the front of the desk.
